extensionName.message: Auto Subtitle Translator & Publisher for YouTube

extensionDescription.message: Automatically translate and register YouTube Studio video subtitles into 26 languages.

errorNoApiKey.message: API Key is not set. Please enter your API Key in the Settings page.

errorNotYoutubeStudio.message: This extension only works on YouTube Studio video edit pages.

optionsUseGeminiOAuth.description: Option to use Google OAuth for Gemini API

optionsDelayDescription.message: Random delay to prevent YouTube server blocking (default: 1000~3000ms)

optionsUseGeminiOAuth.message: Use Google Account (for Gemini Pro subscribers, etc.)

sidebarEmptyGuide.message: Start translation from the YouTube Studio video edit page.

howToStep2Title.message: Open the video you want to translate

howToStep2Desc.message: Select a video from your content list. The video must already have source subtitles.

howToStep3Desc.message: The translation sidebar will appear on the right side of the page. If it doesn't, click the extension icon.

howToStep4Desc.message: Pre-select languages in the settings below, or adjust them directly in the sidebar.

howToStep5Desc.message: Once complete, subtitles are automatically uploaded for each selected language in YouTube Studio.

keyStatusEmpty.message: No key entered. Follow the guide above to get one for free.

guideCardTitle.message: API Key Required — Get one free in 30 seconds!

guideCardSubtitle.message: No credit card needed — just a Google account

guideStep1Title.message: Open Google AI Studio via the button below

guideStep1Desc.message: You can access it immediately with a Google account.

guideStep2Desc.message: There's a blue button at the top right or center. One click and it's done!

guideStep3Title.message: Copy the key and paste it below

guideStep3Desc.message: Your key looks like AIzaSy.... Copy and paste it into the field below.

guideAiStudioBtn.message: Get a Free API Key from Google AI Studio →

guideNote.message: 🔒 Your key is stored only on this device and never sent to external servers.

guideToggleText.message: 📖 Show API key setup guide again

optionsModelHint.message: Translation quality and speed vary by model. Gemini 2.0 Flash is recommended.

optionsSourceLangHint.message: Select "Auto" to automatically detect the video's default subtitle language.

optionsTierHint.message: Select your AI Studio plan. Request speed will be adjusted automatically.

optionsTierFreeDesc.message: AI Studio Free Plan · Auto 5-second interval (~12 RPM)

optionsTierPaidDesc.message: Pay-as-you-go / Billing enabled · Choose your own speed

optionsFreeTierNotice.message:
⚠️ Free Tier Limitations

Gemini's free tier is capped at 1,500 requests per day with a forced 5-second delay between requests.

📊 Usage Examples
• Subtitles every 3 sec, 20-min video × 10 languages → ~80 requests
• Subtitles every 2 sec, 30-min video × 10 languages → ~180 requests
• Subtitles every 2 sec, 30-min video × 26 languages → ~470 requests (≈ 3 videos/day max)

Dense subtitles or more languages drain the quota quickly. The 5-second delay also means translation can take several minutes per video.

💡 Register a payment method in AI Studio to translate without limits and at full speed.

optionsPaidTierNotice.message:
💰 Estimated Cost (Gemini 2.0 Flash)

• 10-min video × 5 languages → approx. $0.01–0.02
• 30-min video × 10 languages → approx. $0.04–0.08
• 60-min video × 26 languages → approx. $0.20–0.40

Cost varies by video length and subtitle density. In general, translating one video costs less than a fraction of a cent per language.

optionsAiDisclaimer.message: 🤖 AI Translation Notice — This extension uses AI (Gemini) to translate subtitles. AI may produce inaccurate translations for context, nuance, or technical terms. Please review the results before uploading. You are responsible for the translated content.
